matcher.coveragePreview: science: acids, bases and salts - session 1 grade 10 students (cbse curriculum) sensory properties of acids and bases natural indicators: litmus, turmeric, china rose acids, bases and salts: session 1 introduction to acids and bases chapter: acids, bases and salts session 1 of 5 focus: properties & indicators what do lemon and soap have in common? sensory properties of acids and bases acids: sour taste, turn blue litmus red bases: bitter taste, slippery feel, turn red litmus blue how litmus paper works litmus solution and paper source: extracted from lichens (plants) forms a purple solution or paper strips acidic solution -> turns red basic solution -> turns blue the magic of turmeric paper turmeric indicator behavior common kitchen spice: turmeric (haldi) natural indicator properties: - yellow color naturally - turns red/brown with bases gudhal (china rose) extract china rose indicator behavior source: petals of china rose (gudhal) extract color: dark pink / magenta - acidic solution -> turns dark pink/magenta - basic solution -> turns green quick recap: indicator colors summary of properties and indicators litmus: blue->red (acid), red->blue (base) turmeric: yellow -> red-brow...
